name: Michael
fact: He is the leader of the Angels and Seraphim who took over managing the system of Heaven following the death of God in the Great War.

name: Gabriel
fact: Known as the strongest female Angel and the most beautiful woman in Heaven, she serves as one of the Four Great Seraphs representing the Hearts suit.

name: Raphael
fact: One of the Four Great Seraphs who governs the suit of Clubs within the Brave Saints system.

name: Uriel
fact: One of the Four Great Seraphs who governs the suit of Diamonds and is known for his strict nature and mastery over holy flames.

name: Dulio Gesualdo
currentAffiliation: Three Factions Alliance / Heaven / Brave Saints
fact: Originally an orphaned human exorcist, he became the leader of the Brave Saints as Michael's Joker and is considered the second strongest human in existence.

name: Irina Shidou
currentAffiliation: Three Factions Alliance / Heaven / Brave Saints / Occult Research Club
fact: Issei's childhood friend who was initially a devout human exorcist before being reincarnated into an Angel under Michael's Spades suit.

name: Griselda Quarta
currentAffiliation: Three Factions Alliance / Heaven / Brave Saints
fact: A high-ranking legal officer of the Church who acts as Xenovia's adoptive older sister and became Gabriel's Queen card.

name: Metatron
currentAffiliation: Three Factions Alliance / Heaven / Ten Seraphs
fact: One of the elite Ten Seraphs who holds a deep fascination with human ninja culture, occasionally living as one in the human world.

name: Sandalphon
currentAffiliation: Three Factions Alliance / Heaven / Ten Seraphs
fact: An elite member of the Ten Seraphs who assists the Four Great Seraphs in maintaining Heaven's divine hierarchy.

name: Raziel
currentAffiliation: Three Factions Alliance / Heaven / Ten Seraphs
fact: A Seraph belonging to the Ten Seraphs who helps oversee the stabilization of the magical systems left behind by God.

name: Lint Sellzen
currentAffiliation: Three Factions Alliance / Heaven / Brave Saints
fact: A quirky former exorcist and the biological sister of Freed Sellzen who was reincarnated into an Angel, eventually becoming a candidate for the Extra Joker piece.

name: Mirana Shatarova
currentAffiliation: Three Factions Alliance / Heaven / Brave Saints
fact: A member of the Brave Saints who serves as the Ace card under the Seraph Gabriel's Hearts faction.

name: Diethelm Waldseemüller
currentAffiliation: Three Factions Alliance / Heaven / Brave Saints
fact: A reincarnated human exorcist who serves as the Ace card under Raphael's Clubs suit within the Brave Saints system.

name: Nero Raimondi
currentAffiliation: Three Factions Alliance / Heaven / Brave Saints
fact: A Brave Saint reincarnated from a human who represents the Ace of Diamonds card under Uriel's direct command.
